MINI MINUTES:

Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193

MOTION Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Tentative Ruling
Off Calendar Apr-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff and moving party Arberzine Fisher (415) 986-4174 appeared telephonically. There were no other appearance.

Upon inquiry the Court elicited from Ms. Fisher that opposing party had not been properly noticed as to argument at this hearing per local rules. The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Ms. Fisher's Motion for reconsideration is denied. Motion for sanctions against Fisher is granted for $500.00. (JJM) Joyce Long, CSR 8620
